economic_notes: First Nation operates Ardmore Golf Course Ltd. through subsidiary 1239774 B.C. Ltd. Management fees of $353,000 charged to Ardmore Golf Course Ltd. GBE had revenue of $1,324,605 and a loss of $136,971 for year ended Dec 31, 2023.
notes: Large investment of $34.8M in temporary investments (GICs) during the year caused cash to drop from $36.95M to $3.57M. Consolidated entities include Bokecen Xaxe (Sacred) Society and 1228435 B.C. Ltd. GBE 1239774 B.C. Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. Prior period adjustment restated 2023 figures. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($3,332,852) + CMHC ($69,630) + FNHA ($983,703) + Gaming Revenue Sharing ($434,243) + Coast Salish Employment & Training ($129,186) + FNESC ($190,871) + DFO ($1,471,834) + Province of BC ($3,517,596) = $10,129,915 less negative deferred revenue adjustment; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. Auditor firm identified from letterhead as Ribeyre CPA based in Port Coquitlam BC.
